name: Spicy Barbecue Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all BBQ sauce ingredients in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a frypan or wok to 375°F (190°C).
4. Deep fry chicken wings in batches until cooked through, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Drain fried wings on an absorbent towel.
6. Place the cooked wings in the simmering BBQ sauce and stir to coat evenly. Serve.
